title: Floral Crisp Polish Sea Bass Grill
description: A bright, low‑calorie Polish‑inspired grilled sea bass with a floral herb vinaigrette, quick to prepare and packed with protein.
instructions: In a small bowl whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, minced garlic, dill, lavender, sea salt, and black pepper to make the vinaigrette.
Place the sea bass fillets in a shallow dish and pour half of the vinaigrette over them, turning to coat. Cover and let marinate for 5–10 minutes in the refrigerator.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium‑high heat and lightly oil the grates to prevent sticking.
Remove fillets from the marinating liquid and grill each side for 3–4 minutes, or until the flesh is opaque and reaches an internal temperature of 145 °F (63 °C).
Transfer the fillets to a serving platter, allow them to rest for 2 minutes, and drizzle the remaining vinaigrette over the top.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve immediately with a side of lightly dressed greens or a citrusy cucumber salad.
